title: hieracium murorum subsp. subfarreilimbatum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. subfarreilimbatum, a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. subfarreilimbatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, which may help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
